backlog_cursor.notes: Run 2: processed all open issues. New issue #273 labelled. PR created for #141 fix.

81.summary: Root cause analysis of datetime timezone bug, referenced PR fix

141.summary: Root cause analysis + PR link comment for shared mutable state crash on empty string search

141.description: Added .copy() in empty-query and non-empty-query paths to prevent shared DataFrame mutation

notes: Run 2: Issue #81 closed (PR #271 merged by maintainer). PR created for #141. Issue #273 new (docstrings) labelled. Still need to comment on older issues #3,5,8,15,25,62,89,107,112. Dependabot PRs #251,#253,#255,#257,#262,#263 still open for potential bundling.
